name: bytedesk
description: ByteDesk's Claude Code marketplace — plugins for parallel multi-session orchestration, hierarchical authorization, and developer tooling.

plugins.name: fleet
plugins.description: Parallel multi-session Claude orchestration. Spawn agents on Jira tickets, run them in parallel git worktrees, observe via dashboard, with hierarchical authorization (ADR-0001) and tool-level event observability.

plugins.name: design-patterns
plugins.description: Source-neutral design-pattern advisor — a 120+ entry Markdown catalog, MCP tooling for recommendations, smell scans, ADR seeds, and graph queries, slash commands, skills, and a dynamic workbench for architecture decisions.
